category_sources: Official GROMACS GitLab project describes it as the GROMACS molecular simulation toolkit.
source_facts.description: Versatile package for molecular dynamics calculations.
display_name_sources: Official GROMACS site and GitLab project use the display name GROMACS.
docs_sources: Official GROMACS manual site is the dedicated documentation surface.
Official GROMACS website points users to the documentation page for installing and using GROMACS.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GROMACS GitLab project is the primary source repository, while GitHub is described as a public backup.
tags_sources: Official GROMACS project describes a molecular simulation toolkit.
